title: lepisorus clathratus f. waltonii
intro: Lepisorus clathratus f. waltonii, also known as the Walnut-leaved Chinese Hart's-tongue fern, is a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Lepisorus clathratus f. waltonii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
